summary.summary: Update to Config.xcconfig: APP_DEV_VERSION changed from 0.8.4.20 to 0.8.4.21.
summary.userFacingImpact: No direct user-facing behavior change is evident in the patch; it only updates the APP_DEV_VERSION value in Config.xcconfig. The provided diff and commit message do not show changes to runtime code or UI. Evidence is insufficient to confirm whether this affects visible version strings or release metadata that end users see; human review is recommended to determine any downstream user-facing effects.
